content_blocks.text:
Head First Java™
Second Edition
Beijing • Cambridge • Köln • Sebastopol • Tokyo
Wouldn’t it be dreamy 
if there was a Java book 
that was more stimulating 
than waiting in line at the 
DMV to renew your driver’5 
license? It’5 probably just a 
fantasy...
Kathy Sierra
Bert Bates
